untranslatable_reason: The Adam Top pattern requires multi-bar pattern recognition: identification of two distinct peaks with specific temporal separation (5-7 weeks optimal), peak similarity validation (0-6% price variation), dip depth measurement between peaks, and confirmation of price closing below an implied confirmation point. These multi-bar structural pattern requirements cannot be expressed using only single-bar price indicators and the allowed operators (comparison, crossover). Pattern detection requires either: (1) custom pattern indicator not in allowed list, (2) array indexing beyond prev_close/prev_high/prev_low/prev_open, or (3) lookback window logic not supported by the operator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex reversal pattern requiring: peak detection across 5-7 week separation, comparative peak analysis, dip topology measurement, and multi-bar confirmation logic. The simplified rule provided captures only the basic SHORT bias when price breaks below recent highs, but misses all pattern-specific validations. A proper implementation would require custom pattern indicators or enhanced lookback capabilities.
